name: Field_Projector
display_fullname: Incarnate Lore Pet Clockwork Support Field Projector
display_help:
The Field Projector protects others from smashing, lethal, fire, cold, energy and negative energy attacks for a limited time. The magnetic nature of the shield makes attacks less likely to land and affect your ally. Multiple Shields can be stacked on one target to improve the defense.

Notes: Field Projector is unaffected by Range changes.

Recharge: Fast.
display_short_help: Ally +DEF(Smash, Lethal, Fire, Cold, Energy, Negative)
